import React,{useState,useEffect}from"react";import axios from"axios";import SearchBar from"../components/SearchBar";import MovieList from"../components/MovieList";import MovieDetail from"../components/MovieDetail";import{jsx as _jsx,Fragment as _Fragment,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Home=()=>{const[movies,setMovies]=useState([]);const[selected,setSelected]=useState(null);const[trending,setTrending]=useState([]);const[popular,setPopular]=useState([]);const BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL;const searchMovies=async query=>{const response=await axios.get("".concat(BASE_URL,"/search/movie"),{params:{query}});setMovies(response.data.results);};// Fetch trending and popular movies
useEffect(()=>{const fetchTrending=async()=>{const res=await axios.get("".concat(BASE_URL,"/trending/movie/week"));setTrending(res.data.results);};const fetchPopular=async()=>{const res=await axios.get("".concat(BASE_URL,"/movie/popular"));setPopular(res.data.results);};fetchTrending();fetchPopular();},[BASE_URL]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"app-container",children:!selected?/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"app-title",children:"\uD83C\uDFAC Movie Explorer"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"app-subtitle",children:"Discover movies, explore details, and find your next favorite film."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(SearchBar,{onSearch:searchMovies}),movies.length>0&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(MovieList,{movies:movies,onSelect:setSelected,title:"Search Results"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(MovieList,{movies:trending,onSelect:setSelected,title:"\uD83D\uDD25 Trending This Week"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(MovieList,{movies:popular,onSelect:setSelected,title:"\u2B50 Popular Movies"})]}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(MovieDetail,{movie:selected,onClose:()=>setSelected(null)})});};export default Home;
